name: SpareBank 1 BV
summary: SpareBank 1 BV provides various banking products and services for private and corporate customers in Norway. It offers current, deposit, bill, and savings accounts; mortgages; consumer, construction, car, boat, motorcycle, caravan, motorhome, and ATV vehicle loans; and bank guarantee, trade credit, agriculture operating credit, and factoring services, as well as vehicle and equipment leasing services. The company also provides auto, electric car, motorhome, veteran, boat, moped, snowmobile, tractor, bike, caravan, trailer, and ATV vehicle insurance products; and house, property, costume, hearing aid, bell, travel, valuables, life, children, disability, critical illness, accident, and health insurance products, as well as dog, cat, and horse insurance. In addition, it offers pension and investment products; financial advisory, accounting, payment, and real estate brokerage services; and mobile and electronic banking services. The company was founded in 1859 and is based in T√É¬∏nsberg, Norway.
